steps.t: The Woodmen Begga, Evrul, Gudule, and Hodver live in the Wolf-denes, south of Vegbár. You should find them and send them to safety before the goblins …
Langhár can be summoned to your side with Langhár's summoning horn. You should talk to Langhár. If Langhár is no longer with you, she may be outside W…
